name: crm-module-demo
description: Module CRM — suivi commercial d'une équipe interne
creator: Mohamed Marwen Maalawi

scripts.setup: node scripts/copy-env.mjs && npm install && npm run contracts:build && npm run db:up && npm -w backend run prisma:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.build: npm run contracts:build && npm -w backend run build && npm -w frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm -w backend run lint && npm -w frontend run lint
scripts.test: npm -w backend run test && npm -w frontend run test
